div.h2: Interconnect Comparison: NVLink 3.0 vs. InfiniBand HDR

text.tspan: RECOMMENDATION: Use NVLink for intra-chassis Peer-to-Peer (P2P)

ul.li: Saturation Point: NVLink maintains sub-microsecond synchronization overhead up to 16 nodes.
Bottleneck Analysis: IB efficiency degradation is primarily attributed to MPI_AllReduce latency in hierarchical topologies.
Critical Threshold: At 64 GPUs, NVLink provides 1.65x the effective compute throughput of standard IB HDR.
